programme.title: Aux avant-postes[Live]
programme.desc: Dans un monde en pleine mutation, Ali Laïdi décrypte, avec ses invités, les enjeux cachés des conflits économiques, géopolitiques et culturels, afin d'en comprendre les dynamiques profondes.

programme.title: Focus
programme.desc: Présentation d'un reportage tourné par les correspondants de France 24 sur un sujet qui fait l'actualité dans leur pays, suivi du décryptage par l'invité.

programme.title: Sports
programme.desc: Un suivi de toutes les news sportives et les résultats avec ce magazine animé par des spécialistes du football, du basketball, du tennis et du cyclisme.

programme.title: Le club Paris direct[Live]
programme.desc: Des experts issus de la géopolitique, des sciences de l'environnement, des sciences sociales et de la culture se réunissent pour analyser et débattre des sujets majeurs qui dominent l'actualité. Leurs échanges offrent des clés de compréhension sur les enjeux contemporains et leurs impacts.

programme.title: Focus
programme.desc: Présentation d'un reportage tourné par les correspondants de France 24 sur un sujet qui fait l'actualité dans leur pays, suivi du décryptage par l'invité.

programme.title: Sports
programme.desc: Un suivi de toutes les news sportives et les résultats avec ce magazine animé par des spécialistes du football, du basketball, du tennis et du cyclisme.

programme.title: Autour du monde : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: Les informations qui font la une aux quatre coins du monde sont décryptées à travers des reportages, des analyses approfondies et le travail de correspondants internationaux. Un regard global et complet sur l'actualité pour mieux comprendre les événements qui façonnent notre époque.

programme.title: Le rendez-vous de l'Afrique[Live]

'International Cross-Strait Critics' has different experts who will guide you from the superficial to the profound, helping you grasp the development context, deconstruct the major trends, and gain insights into new domains.

programme.title: E5 - Ulaanbaatar
programme.desc: Half of Mongolia lives in this city. And they drive their cars like they ride their horses: fast and furious.

programme.title: E10 - Southern Discomfort
programme.desc: An inner-city youth mentor, who is scared of the wild, joins Bear Grylls for an adventure outside his comfort zone. Brandon’s mission is to face his fears and inspire kids in his community.

programme.title: E5 - Ulaanbaatar
programme.desc: Half of Mongolia lives in this city. And they drive their cars like they ride their horses: fast and furious.

programme.title: E8 - Indonesia
programme.desc: Rooftop and Catfish explore Indonesia in a fiery way. The duo test out their manhoods with leech therapy, wall jumping, participating in a traditional whip dance, and trying the ancient martial art of debus. They then slow down for a moment to stop and smell the Indonesian fruit durian and cut one out of a tree to taste test. Finally their Indonesian adventure ends with a game of flaming soccer in the streets and sulfur mining in the mouth of a volcano. With all of these wild and dangerous activities, can Rooftop and Catfish handle the heat of Indonesia?

programme.title: E1 - Lionfish
programme.desc: The white sand beaches and emerald green waters of Destin, Florida are the setting for the 'World's Luckiest Fishing Villages.' Beneath the water's surface, it's a different story...one of the most formidable species, the lionfish, has been wreaking havoc on the local ecosystem for decades. The ecological advantage of the lionfish is its venomous spikes, used to corner prey and protect itself from predators, and giving it an advantage over native fish. Luckily, local conservationists and fishing captains discovered years ago that lionfish are as tasty as they are dangerous. Yia joins local biologist Alex Fogg as he works to mitigate the lionfish's damage by harvesting them one buttery, flaky bite at a time.

programme.title: E2 - Feral Hogs
programme.desc: The feral hog is one of the most formidable species on the planet. Possessing a unique combination of high reproductive capacity, size, and adaptability, the feral hog absolutely decimates entire ecosystems. With pork chops on his mind, Yia travels to the Florida/Alabama border to join Jennifer Bearden and Zack Franks who are doing their part to help control the rampant feral hog population menacing Florida.

programme.desc: An inner-city youth mentor, who is scared of the wild, joins Bear Grylls for an adventure outside his comfort zone. Brandon’s mission is to face his fears and inspire kids in his community.

programme.title: E5 - Ulaanbaatar
programme.desc: Half of Mongolia lives in this city. And they drive their cars like they ride their horses: fast and furious.

programme.title: E1 - Lionfish
programme.desc: The white sand beaches and emerald green waters of Destin, Florida are the setting for the 'World's Luckiest Fishing Villages.' Beneath the water's surface, it's a different story...one of the most formidable species, the lionfish, has been wreaking havoc on the local ecosystem for decades. The ecological advantage of the lionfish is its venomous spikes, used to corner prey and protect itself from predators, and giving it an advantage over native fish. Luckily, local conservationists and fishing captains discovered years ago that lionfish are as tasty as they are dangerous. Yia joins local biologist Alex Fogg as he works to mitigate the lionfish's damage by harvesting them one buttery, flaky bite at a time.

programme.title: E2 - Feral Hogs
programme.desc: The feral hog is one of the most formidable species on the planet. Possessing a unique combination of high reproductive capacity, size, and adaptability, the feral hog absolutely decimates entire ecosystems. With pork chops on his mind, Yia travels to the Florida/Alabama border to join Jennifer Bearden and Zack Franks who are doing their part to help control the rampant feral hog population menacing Florida.

programme.title: E8 - Indonesia
programme.desc: Rooftop and Catfish explore Indonesia in a fiery way. The duo test out their manhoods with leech therapy, wall jumping, participating in a traditional whip dance, and trying the ancient martial art of debus. They then slow down for a moment to stop and smell the Indonesian fruit durian and cut one out of a tree to taste test. Finally their Indonesian adventure ends with a game of flaming soccer in the streets and sulfur mining in the mouth of a volcano. With all of these wild and dangerous activities, can Rooftop and Catfish handle the heat of Indonesia?

programme.title: Young And Lonely - Ways Out Of Isolation
programme.desc: Loneliness is often underestimated - especially among young people. The documentary follows four young people: Ellen, Gordon, Lilli and Vanelynn, who feel isolated for very different reasons.

programme.title: Why Losing Weight Is So Difficult - And What Really Helps
programme.desc: Working out plenty and eating sensibly - but those stubborn love handles remain? In Good Shape explains why exercise alone often fails to trigger fat loss - and why your individual metabolism plays a crucial role.

programme.desc: Keep up with the latest news from all over the globe with Focus on France 24. Focus programme provides exclusive reports from Monday to Friday at 7.50 am Paris time. programme.title: E1 - The Boy Who Hunts Akuma
programme.desc: Allen Walker arrives in London to visit Black Order Headquarters. He is suspected of killing Officer Charles and is unable to investigate the case.

programme.title: E21 - The Heroes Fight Bravely
programme.desc: Tomoe and Mio lead their forces to reclaim their homeland, Kaleneon. Meanwhile, in the Gritonia Empire, the powerful adventurer Sophia, allied with demons, confronts Tomoki.

programme.title: E5 - The Spirit Of The Letter/Dna In The Waterworks
programme.desc: The art of calligraphy has found a devoted defender in Jean-Sebastien. This monk from Fribourg harmoniously blends prayer, artistic creation and contemplative immersion in the silence of Einsiedeln Abbey. Tristan Favre, a young plumber, prepares to take over the family business from his mother Nicole Wolff, Geneva's first woman plumber.

programme.title: E2 - Yves Saint Laurent Museum/Philip Chronopoulos
programme.desc: Avenue Marceau, Paris, the Yves Saint Laurent Museum is dedicated to the great French haute couture designer. Philip Chronopoulos is head chef, working beneath the arcades of the Palais Royal.

This monk from Fribourg harmoniously blends prayer, artistic creation and contemplative immersion in the silence of Einsiedeln Abbey. Tristan Favre, a young plumber, prepares to take over the family business from his mother Nicole Wolff, Geneva's first woman plumber.

programme.desc: Humiliated by her ex's family, Mansi rebuilds her life with Vikrant's help, but when her former lover returns seeking forgiveness, old pain threatens her new success. Release Year: 1999 Director: Subhash Ghai

programme.desc: Reborn in different lands, Karan and Arjun reunite through their mother's faith, rising again to take revenge on those who destroyed them in a past life. Release Year: 1995 Director: Rakesh Roshan Awards: Best Action- Bikhu Verma, Best Editing- Sanjay Varma.

programme.title: Maa
programme.desc: 1976 Drama Vijay lives in the jungles where he makes a living by trapping animals. One elephant, enraged at being separated from its child, goes on a rampage. programme.title: The Astronaut
programme.desc: After returning from her first space mission, astronaut Sam Walker fears that something extraterrestrial has followed her back to Earth.

programme.title: US Squawk Box
programme.desc: “Squawk Box” is the ultimate pre-market morning news and talk program, where the biggest names in business and politics tell their most important stories. Anchored by Joe Kernen, Becky Quick and Andrew Ross Sorkin, the show brings Wall Street to Main Street. It's a must-see for everyone from the professional trader to the casual investor.

programme.title: Squawk On The Street
programme.desc: Headquartered live on the floor of the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) where the biggest companies in the world trade, “Squawk On The Street” tracks the action of every stock and gives you access to the treasury, currency and commodity action in real time.

programme.title: The Exchange
programme.desc: CNBC's ‘The Exchange' is the newsroom-based program for today's investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today's markets and investors. CNBC's deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: The Exchange
programme.desc: CNBC's “The Exchange” is the newsroom-based program for today's Investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today's markets and investors. CNBC's deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: Closing Bell
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC's Scott Wapner, “Closing Bell” guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what's driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC's Scott Wapner, “Closing Bell” guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what's driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. “Closing Bell: Overtime” takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow's trading day.

programme.title: Squawk Box Asia
programme.desc: Squawk Box Asia is CNBC's flagship show that sets the news agenda and takes viewers through the pre-game and the opening of Asia's business trading day, covering the top market moving stories and views from the top CEOs, asset managers and newsmakers

programme.title: Squawk Box Europe
programme.desc: It's one hour until the opening bell in Europe and Squawk Box Europe has everything you need to prepare for the first trade. Steve Sedgwick, Karen Tso and Julianna Tatelbaum take on the most complex stories of the day with instant analysis on how you can make your money work around the news.

programme.title: US Squawk Box
programme.desc: “Squawk Box” is the ultimate pre-market morning news and talk program, where the biggest names in business and politics tell their most important stories. Anchored by Joe Kernen, Becky Quick and Andrew Ross Sorkin, the show brings Wall Street to Main Street. It's a must-see for everyone from the professional trader to the casual investor.

programme.title: Squawk On The Street
programme.desc: Headquartered live on the floor of the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) where the biggest companies in the world trade, “Squawk On The Street” tracks the action of every stock and gives you access to the treasury, currency and commodity action in real time.

programme.title: The Exchange
programme.desc: CNBC's ‘The Exchange' is the newsroom-based program for today's investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today's markets and investors. CNBC's deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: Closing Bell
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC's Scott Wapner, “Closing Bell” guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what's driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC's Scott Wapner, “Closing Bell” guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what's driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. “Closing Bell: Overtime” takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow's trading day.

Steve Sedgwick, Karen Tso and Julianna Tatelbaum take on the most complex stories of the day with instant analysis on how you can make your money work around the news.

programme.title: US Squawk Box
programme.desc: “Squawk Box” is the ultimate pre-market morning news and talk program, where the biggest names in business and politics tell their most important stories. Anchored by Joe Kernen, Becky Quick and Andrew Ross Sorkin, the show brings Wall Street to Main Street. It's a must-see for everyone from the professional trader to the casual investor.

programme.desc: In one of the most beloved sci-fi horror classics ever, a mysterious amphibious monster escapes captivity in order to be with a scientist’s beautiful female lab assistant.

programme.title: Last Hero In China
programme.desc: Wong Fei Hong investigates why lots of village girls have gone missing and discovers that it's organised by the law enforcer. A big fight ensures between Wong and the bad guys...

programme.title: Days Of Being Wild
programme.desc: A self-obsessed man, desperately seeking his true identity, York plays carelessly with his lovers and his friends before leaving them all to the Philippines in search of the truth...

programme.title: Project A
programme.desc: This is Hong Kong at the turn of the century. The South China Sea is crawling with smugglers, cut-throats and pirates and none is more successful than the gang led by the notorious pirate Lo. Government forces invariably lose to Lo. Finally the Government looks the other way whenever Lo is around. Young seaman Jackie Chan, so far better known for his bar room fights, resigns from the Marine Force. He plans to stage a personal vendetta against Lo. Jackie gets the help of Samo Hung, little knowing Samo has his own axe to grind. Jackie and Samo suffer an inglorious drubbing in the hands of Lo. Jackie, now completely incensed, decides to don the uniform once again. He finds young commander Yuen Biao sympathetic to his cause but adamant against his antics...

programme.title: Black Vengeance
programme.desc: Lee Ah Chai, a native Chiu Chow, a province of China. He was married with children of his own. He was rich, powerful and influential and he was the leading man in the underworld, virtually to as the ‘Big Boss'. But he was unhappy. After spending so many years involving with vice and crime, he was sick of this world and wanted to start his life anew. Some ten years ago, Chai had two side-kicks, Tang Kar Yung and Chan Ting Kok. Kok was adopted by Uncle Cut, the father of Yung. The two boys were raised up together and they were like brothers, if not by blood. But a misconception broke out which overshadowed the relationship amongst the three of them. It led Chai and Yung to divergence and the fight of Kok to Malacca...

programme.title: Fist Power
programme.desc: Retired veteran CHAU and his six-year-old son DONG DONG play cheerfully at a park. Suddenly, a couple shows up with their bodyguards. The woman has stayed with CHAU while pregnant, but later left him for a rich tycoon CHIU. Today, they come to get their son. Helplessly, CHAU watches them take away the crying child. He swears to bring him back. CHEUK is captain of a mainland security team. One day, CHEUK picks up his nephew after school as usual. Yet, the school is surrounded by the police. In fact, CHAU has taken students' hostage demanding to see his son. Or, he will bomb the school...

programme.title: The Royal Scoundrel
programme.desc: Beach Boy and Mrs. Chow have been partners in the police force for years. While investigating a special case, Beach Boy met Ah Yuk whose step-father was one of the crime members. Ah Yuk was alone in Hong Kong and Beach Boy first pitied her, then later fell in love with her. Beach Boy's superior, Inspector Lee Nam who appears to be honest is actually one of the Taiwanese group. He set up Beach Boy and Mrs. Chow. He also courted Ah Yuk...

programme.title: E5 - And The Firm Had Two Partners...
programme.desc: Carmen and Liz represent Rivi suing a hospital who according to him discriminated black and brown COVID patients, which led to his daughter's death. Diane tries to get Kurt to name his shooting range friends, but he refuses.

programme.title: E6 - And The Two Partners Had A Fight...
programme.desc: Liz is under pressure when she needs to choose between her loyalty to Diane and the partners who protest about Diane being a named partner. One of Wackner's defendants is suing him.

programme.title: E7 - And The Fight Had A Detente...
programme.desc: Despite the tension between them, Liz and Diane represent a family suing the Chicago police for violence against their daughter. Marissa is the prosecutor in judge Wackner's court.

programme.title: E4 - A Good Thing That Hurts
programme.desc: The arrival of a special patient intensifies the competition between the interns. Meanwhile, Andrea involves the ward in the search for his email account password, which could help him reconstruct a key part of his past.

programme.title: E5 - The Mistake
programme.desc: Giulia brings Andrea back to the ward for a patient who has asked to be exclusively examined by him and who does not know about his current condition. programme.title: 2018-2019 江蘇衛視跨年演唱會
programme.desc: 亞洲流行天后蔡依林再度加盟，全能音樂才子李榮浩和華語歌王周華健傾情助陣，還有兩岸三地歌手朴樹、毛不易、薛之謙、摩登兄弟、劉維等帶來精彩表演，與你一起high唱迎接新年到來!

programme.title: E8 - 開啟「睡眠大作戰」
programme.desc: 「極挑團」原班人馬將與新成員一起解鎖更多挑戰，他們將與廣大觀眾一起跨越大江南北，體驗國民生活百態，用真心探訪這片古老土地上正在發生的溫情故事，以更豐富的視角觸摸這卷山河下每一位個體的對美好生活的深切期望。

programme.title: E46 - 精英獵頭獲花式告白
programme.desc: 《非誠勿擾》全新改版，24位女嘉賓分為心動區和觀察區，男嘉賓暫不亮相，在「第二現場」與女嘉賓隔空對話。男女嘉賓通過雙向選擇，決定兩人能否成功牽手。

programme.title: E8 - 開啟「睡眠大作戰」
programme.desc: 「極挑團」原班人馬將與新成員一起解鎖更多挑戰，他們將與廣大觀眾一起跨越大江南北，體驗國民生活百態，用真心探訪這片古老土地上正在發生的溫情故事，以更豐富的視角觸摸這卷山河下每一位個體的對美好生活的深切期望。

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 千金小姐林夏不幸被贅婿葉冬設局陷害，不僅失明、父親亦遭毒手。她在重見光明後，看穿了丈夫覬覦家產的邪惡真面目；為了奪回一切並揭開真相，林夏決定改頭換面，以全新身份潛入舊日世界，向渣男與同夥展開一步步毫不留情的復仇。

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 丁當在訂婚前夕與初戀陳阿明重逢，卻不料對方竟改名餘坤並擁有了新身份，為治癒陳阿明因實驗失敗導致的人格分裂，丁當與友人暗中佈局，以糖衣計劃引導他直面過去的傷痛，從撕裂的情感與記憶中脫困。

programme.title: E57
programme.desc: 兼顧情緒價值輸出，為女性量身打造兼具時尚審美與人文關懷的變裝微綜藝，全方位多角度地向社會傳遞積極的生活態度；種草生活好物、推薦文旅線路、科普健康知識。

programme.title: E1 - 張碧晨武藝張紫寧抓馬修羅場
programme.desc: 五位全新的音樂人梁龍、胡夏、白舉綱、希林娜依·高、黃子弘凡以歌手形象反轉擔任Live House工作人員，以全新的姿態再度開啟這趟音樂旅程。同時，帶著全新口號「總有快樂發聲」，一起共同見證更多生活中的美好與驚喜。

programme.desc: Detectives gather crucial information about a double-homicide from neighbourhood surveillance footage, but they're not able to identify and track the killer until some key digital data is uncovered.

programme.title: E10 - No Bond, No Problem
programme.desc: Young adults learn the hard way that their actions have consequences. Three young men exploring abandoned buildings get charged with felony burglary.

programme.title: E121 - In A Lonely Place
programme.desc: After New Orleans detectives find a woman's burnt body in her car's trunk, they discover that her desperate 911 call went unheeded.

programme.title: E121 - In A Lonely Place
programme.desc: After New Orleans detectives find a woman's burnt body in her car's trunk, they discover that her desperate 911 call went unheeded.

programme.title: E121 - In A Lonely Place
programme.desc: After New Orleans detectives find a woman's burnt body in her car's trunk, they discover that her desperate 911 call went unheeded.

programme.title: We can be Heroes
programme.desc: Izzy is back at the hospital to get the results of her MRI scan and is worried that her dreams of a career as an acro gymnast may be over. Back at his home, Chase is choosing photos for a school presentation.

programme.title: The Future Is: Hands-free Driving
programme.desc: European engineering firms are developing a new technology that allows cars to drive you instead of you driving them. The so-called 'road train system' consists of a lead truck and vehicles that are linked to it.

programme.title: Magic 9's
programme.desc: In this episode, mathemagician Eric reveals a cool math trick that illustrates the special properties of the number 9. Follow a given sequence ... multiply by three, add three, multiply by three, and then add two digits. What just happened?! It's not magic ... it's math!

programme.title: Whale of a Time
programme.desc: Darwin, Newts and Heni look after and re-float a whale that has become stranded in the bay.

programme.title: Day of the Egg
programme.desc: Ricky thinks he has nothing to spread on his toast until a giant egg is mysteriously delivered. Worried it could contain a baby T-Rex, Ricky distracts himself with art, making a prehistoric mask and a paperweight inspired by Rachel Whiteread.

programme.title: Nature's got Talent
programme.desc: When disaster strikes just hours before their big performance at the Kiwifruit Valley Music Festival, Darwin and Newts have to find new ways to make music using creatures from nature.

programme.title: The Not So Fishy Mystery
programme.desc: When the fish in the local pond all seem to disappear, Addison and Tess fear that they ended up as fish sticks in the school cafeteria's lunch special and set out to solve the mystery

programme.title: Luck of the Irish
programme.desc: When Anabella breaks a mirror, she worries that she's going to have bad luck, and refuses to go through with her Irish dancing recital! But are superstitions real? They travel to Blarney, Ireland to try to find a four-leaf clover to turn her luck around.

programme.title: Dolphin
programme.desc: Today Kristina has to perform an ultrasound on Ulysses, the dolphin's, eye. But can she train Ulysses to keep her eye open long enough to perform the vital test? Meet also Garoe, a one-year-old chimp and Dali, the emperor tamarin, who has an age-old problem.

programme.title: Crayon
programme.desc: Colouring isn't the only thing these crayons are good at! Join Hepi and Briko as they blow your mind with creative and colourful DIYs

programme.title: Trip to Siberia
programme.desc: While Zoe and Milo warm up inside, Alim suggests skating. The kids doubt it's possible in such cold. To prove them wrong, Alim takes them to Siberia. There, Sergei shows them Siberian life-permafrost, stilt houses, and melting ice for water.

programme.title: Trip to Reunion
programme.desc: Zoe and Milo are surprised by wasps during lunch. Alim says they should be happy to see them. To explain, he takes them to Reunion Island. During a picnic, a swarm of wasps causes panic, but Zoe and Milo learn that on this island, wasps are actually a popular delicacy.

programme.title: Trip to India
programme.desc: For hamsters' day, Zoe and Milo want to surprise Alim by making confetti to throw on their little friend. But Alim knows a place on earth where people celebrate by throwing something more interesting than confetti up in the air. Our heroes land in Rajasthan, India.

programme.title: A Stinky Mission
programme.desc: At the restaurant Meatball meets the stinky cat Gas, who says he is tired of living in the trash bin of the alley. Meatball offers to help him find a new home, so the two cats leave for a daring adventure in the city.

programme.title: Drawings in the Sky
programme.desc: Luna is given an old family book all about constellations. She is determined to find every single constellation in the book.

programme.title: Pencil
programme.desc: Boom should guess what Reds draw on the floor.

programme.title: Gone Viral
programme.desc: Naomi's makeup blog is a hit, driving Carol and Motor crazy-Carol wants the internet used for good, Motor wants more views on his game page. A viral video contest begins, and even Robbie joins. But in the end, a surprise player creates the video that truly goes viral.

programme.title: Cousin
programme.desc: Robbie's been lying to his cool cousin Bobbie for years to impress him. Now Bobbie's visiting, and Robbie must convince his friends to play along-Carol as his girlfriend, Motor as his best friend, Albert as his bodyguard. But is Bobbie really who he claims to be?

programme.title: X Marks the Spot
programme.desc: When a message in a bottle washes up on shore, Darwin and Newts must use their knot knowledge to follow the trail to some pirate treasure.

programme.title: Connect with Tech
programme.desc: When rain prevents Darwin and Newts from holding a ‘show and tell' day, they use the Internet to connect with their forest whanau remotely.

programme.title: The Acid Test!
programme.desc: The doctors test how strong your stomach acid really is. And will it be Dr Chris, Dr Xand or Dr Ronx who gets snotted in Ouchology?

programme.title: The Day Henry Met...a Lute
programme.desc: Today Henry meets a Lute, and he becomes a great Adventurer so he can take Lute on an amazing adventure!

programme.title: The Acid Test!
programme.desc: The doctors test how strong your stomach acid really is. And will it be Dr Chris, Dr Xand or Dr Ronx who gets snotted in Ouchology?

programme.title: Tough Challenges
programme.desc: The Junior Vets are facing tough challenges and unusual tasks. From swimming with critically endangered sharks to performing tricky surgery on a dog's knee, the kids are trying to prove they've got what it takes to care for unwell animals.

programme.title: E16 - Escaping Devil's Island
programme.desc: Rene Belbenoit, a petty thief, is captured and sent to France's notorious penal colony in French Guiana. He determines to escape or die trying. His story becomes the basis of several popular movies.

programme.title: E1 - The Beginning
programme.desc: In September 1939, enabled by a secret pact between Adolf Hitler and Josef Stalin, Germany invades Poland with its lightning style of tank warfare, plunging Europe back into war.

programme.title: E3 - Barbarossa
programme.desc: Operation Barbarossa, Nazi Germany's surprise invasion of the Soviet Union, launches on June 22, 1941. In what is the largest military operation in history, Hitler aims to capture their economic resources.

programme.title: E2 - The Missing Giants
programme.desc: Did a Bermuda Triangle tsunami claim two behemoth ships, or did they fall prey to Nazi U-Boats? The team sets its sights on a famous Bermuda Triangle case: the twin vanishings of two massive cargo ships.

programme.title: E2 - The Big Ten
programme.desc: The Landry's target the legendary beasts of Cow Island. Daniel sets an ambitious goal to catch 10 alligators over 10 feet long. Ashley gambles on a new hunting ground.

programme.title: E1 - Game Day Goofs & Grandma's Fixes!
programme.desc: Get ready for game day goofs & Grandma's amazing fixes! The fun starts with a basketball game, but when Max the Monster Truck tries a slam dunk, he breaks his suspension & gets a teddy bear stuck in the hoop! Then, when Gecko gets a boo boo while trying to fix Bobby the Bus's mixed-up controls, Grandma Gecko arrives just in time to help with the repair. The day ends with Grandma's own goof, as she starts sleepwalking during a sleepover!

programme.title: E2 - Underwater Learning Adventures!
programme.desc: Dive into some underwater learning adventures with The Sharksons! First, join the sea friends as they swim through the alphabet to learn their ABCs. Then, explore the vibrant hues of Splashy Reef with a journey to learn all the shades of a beautiful rainbow. The learning continues with important daily routines! Sing along with Tucker the Turtle as he takes a bath & watch as Baby Grub eagerly learns the importance of dental care by brushing her big, sharp shark teeth!

programme.title: E1 - A Super Fun Underwater Sing-Along!
programme.desc: Get ready for a super fun underwater sing-along with The Sharksons! Join the fun as five little reef sharks learn their lesson about jumping on the bed. Then, meet an 'Itsy Bitsy' sea spider who keeps trying to climb an underwater cliff with a little help from her friends! The classic rhymes continue with a curious crab acting out the story of Humpty Dumpty & a cozy pajama party with ten friends in a bed. It's a sing-along full of classic tunes with a fun, fishy twist!

programme.title: E2 - A Calming Night with Twinkle!
programme.desc: Have a calming & magical night with Twinkle the star! When Bao Bao struggles to sleep, Twinkle arrives & transforms into a hot air balloon to lift her cot into the night sky so she can see the moon. Then, she helps Max, Muffin & Bao Bao get ready for bed by transforming into a cuddly teddy bear to give them all warm goodnight hugs. From creating a magical rainbow over the bath to turning into a kite for a gentle ride, Twinkle always makes bedtime magical.

programme.title: E2 - Underwater Learning Adventures!
programme.desc: Dive into some underwater learning adventures with The Sharksons! First, join the sea friends as they swim through the alphabet to learn their ABCs. Then, explore the vibrant hues of Splashy Reef with a journey to learn all the shades of a beautiful rainbow. The learning continues with important daily routines! Sing along with Tucker the Turtle as he takes a bath & watch as Baby Grub eagerly learns the importance of dental care by brushing her big, sharp shark teeth!

programme.title: E1 - A Super Fun Underwater Sing-Along!
programme.desc: Get ready for a super fun underwater sing-along with The Sharksons! Join the fun as five little reef sharks learn their lesson about jumping on the bed. The classic rhymes continue with a curious crab acting out the story of Humpty Dumpty & a cozy pajama party with ten friends in a bed. It's a sing-along full of classic tunes with a fun, fishy twist!

programme.title: E3 - The Ultimate Outdoor Play Day!
programme.desc: Get ready for the ultimate outdoor play day! Mummy & Daddy take the kids to the park to fly colorful Japanese koinobori kites. Then, Mia & Max head to the pond to feed the ducks, but are shocked to find there are no ducks there! They must go on an adventure to find them. The outdoor fun continues as Mummy sets up a painting session in the park, where the kids have fun discovering new colors with their fingers, hands & feet!

programme.title: E2 - From Bathtime to Bedtime Fun!
programme.desc: Go from bathtime to bedtime with Mia & Max! The fun starts with a splashy, bubbly good time as the kids play with their rubber ducks & get nice & clean in the tub. After the bath, it's time to get into pajamas & play a fun game of Peek-a-boo with Mummy using lots of different objects from around the house. Finally, it's time for bed as Daddy & Ella take turns giving Max a cuddle & a teddy bear before he goes to sleep. Night night!

programme.title: E1 - From Dinosaurs To Pet Knights!
programme.desc: Blippi is on an adventure from dinosaurs to pet knights! He travels back in time with Tabbs to help a little Microraptor prove that being small has its benefits when they rescue a giant sauropod from the mud. Then, they head to the African savannah to learn how to roar, sneak & pounce like a lion! Back at the clubhouse, Blippi learns how to interpret a puppy's tail wags & even travels back in time again to help a real-life knight in shining armor—who happens to be a corgi!

programme.title: E2 - Gecko vs Weasel: Ultimate Rivalry
programme.desc: The ultimate rivalry between Gecko & Mr. Weasel heats up! After a big rainstorm, Weasel challenges Gecko to a head-to-head car wash competition. Then, Weasel decides he wants a Mechanical of his own, so he hatches a scheme to try & steal Gecko's secret plans! The rivalry continues as Weasel tries to show off his new sports car but gets stuck, & his automated car wash mistakes Weasel for his car!

programme.title: E11 - Villain Time

programme.title: The Exchange
programme.desc: Dojo and May are a loving couple. Because Dojo has a brain tumor and needs 1 million baht for the operation, they decide to rob a money exchange store. Unluckily, the couple with 10 unfortunate patrons of the money exchange center are held hostages by 3 professional robbers on the same day. It is a robbery inside another robbery as well as some secrets among these people will be revealed. What could possibly happen when these people are trapped in the store with no way to escape?

programme.title: Citizen of a Kind
programme.desc: The scammer who scammed my money asked for help! Duk-hee, an energetic woman looking into various loans due to a laundry fire, receives a call from a bank clerk named Son offering a reasonable loan. Sending money to Son who demanded various fee for the loan, she later realizes that the entire process was a voice phishing scam, leaving her in shock. Having lost her entire fortune and forced to live on the streets with her children, Duk-hee receives another call from Son one day... This time, it's a plea for help! Determined to rescue the scammer and recover her lost money, Duk-hee equips herself with various skills and, along with her colleagues, who are equally determined, to take matters into her own hands.

programme.title: Trailblazing
programme.desc: The feature program 'Trailblazing' on Shenzhen TV fully illustrates Shenzhen's trailblazing exploration and demonstration role as a pilot demonstration zone for socialism with Chinese characteristics. programme.title: News Of Shenzhen
programme.desc: Presented as a leisurely variety show, the program revolves around the theme: 'Seek Paradise Along the Journey to Kunlun Mountain.' Throughout their travels, the adventurers will uncover lesser-known towns, each exuding its own unique charm. They will explore the distinctive characteristics of these hidden gems, savoring every street and lane, as well as every bite and sip. This immersive experience seeks to rediscover the essence of life, allowing our weary hearts to shine anew amidst the dust of daily grind.

programme.title: E6 - Vancouver Island
programme.desc: Journey to the wild Pacific coast on the western shore of Vancouver Island in British Columbia. From the peaks of mountain glaciers to the canopies of Canada’s only rainforest, nature and human spirit coexist in spectacular habitats.

programme.title: E2 - Rebuilding an Empire
programme.desc: Over the course of recorded time, many species have been threatened with extinction. Once-powerful animal empires – like the dinosaurs - have been completely wiped from the planet. But others once on the verge of disappearance have survived, bounced back, and even reclaimed their kingdoms.

programme.title: E2 - The Hummingbird’s Quest
programme.desc: From Colombia’s high plains of the Páramo to its tropical forests, hummingbirds have evolved into an extraordinary number of species. Whether battling freezing rain or jungle predators, each mother must struggle to build a nest, protect her eggs.

programme.title: E6 - Vancouver Island
programme.desc: Journey to the wild Pacific coast on the western shore of Vancouver Island in British Columbia. From the peaks of mountain glaciers to the canopies of Canada’s only rainforest, nature and human spirit coexist in spectacular habitats.

programme.title: E2 - Rebuilding an Empire
programme.desc: Over the course of recorded time, many species have been threatened with extinction. Once-powerful animal empires – like the dinosaurs - have been completely wiped from the planet. But others once on the verge of disappearance have survived, bounced back, and even reclaimed their kingdoms.

programme.title: E2 - Under Pressure
programme.desc: As food and water become scarce, Crystal, the fierce leader of the Ruins gang, sets her sights on rival Kati’s territory and its neighboring fruit trees. Watch as Crystal’s move and a raid by outside invaders lead to dire consequences for one troop.

programme.title: E3 - Into the Darkness
programme.desc: Stay up late as the northern team attaches an activity tag to a bull shark and finds out what this night owl does after sunset. Then dive 80 meters deep with the southern team, who are hoping to put a satellite tracker on a female great white.

programme.title: E2 - The Hummingbird’s Quest
programme.desc: From Colombia’s high plains of the Páramo to its tropical forests, hummingbirds have evolved into an extraordinary number of species. Whether battling freezing rain or jungle predators, each mother must struggle to build a nest, protect her eggs.

programme.title: E2 - The Hummingbird’s Quest
programme.desc: From Colombia’s high plains of the Páramo to its tropical forests, hummingbirds have evolved into an extraordinary number of species. Whether battling freezing rain or jungle predators, each mother must struggle to build a nest, protect her eggs.

programme.title: E4 - The Lower Zambezi
programme.desc: Food, water and shelter are essential to all life on earth from the smallest of beings to the largest, and along the banks of one of Africa’s greatest rivers, some animals struggle while others thrive. A rhythm drives all animals as they journey in search of what they need to survive, and each must decide where and when to move if they’re to succeed... These are the magical worlds of the Lower Zambezi.

programme.title: E1 - Big Move
programme.desc: The Lilayi Elephant Nursery near Lusaka in Zambia is home to four orphan elephants. The two oldest, four-year- olds Musolole and Zambezi, have been here since they were just a few months old. These boisterous babies are out-growing the nursery and it’s time to move to big school. Two hundred miles away, in the heart of Kafue National Park, lies elephant heaven - Camp Phoenix, the project’s release facility, where older orphans are already adapting to life in the wild.

programme.title: E2 - The Hummingbird’s Quest
programme.desc: From Colombia’s high plains of the Páramo to its tropical forests, hummingbirds have evolved into an extraordinary number of species. Whether battling freezing rain or jungle predators, each mother must struggle to build a nest, protect her eggs.

These are the magical worlds of the Lower Zambezi.

programme.desc: Journey to the wild Pacific coast on the western shore of Vancouver Island in British Columbia. From the peaks of mountain glaciers to the canopies of Canada’s only rainforest, nature and human spirit coexist in spectacular habitats.

programme.title: E1 - Big Move
programme.desc: The Lilayi Elephant Nursery near Lusaka in Zambia is home to four orphan elephants. The two oldest, four-year- olds Musolole and Zambezi, have been here since they were just a few months old. These boisterous babies are out-growing the nursery and it’s time to move to big school. Two hundred miles away, in the heart of Kafue National Park, lies elephant heaven - Camp Phoenix, the project’s release facility, where older orphans are already adapting to life in the wild.

programme.title: E2 - Rebuilding an Empire
programme.desc: Over the course of recorded time, many species have been threatened with extinction. Once-powerful animal empires – like the dinosaurs - have been completely wiped from the planet. But others once on the verge of disappearance have survived, bounced back, and even reclaimed their kingdoms.

programme.title: E6 - Vancouver Island
programme.desc: Journey to the wild Pacific coast on the western shore of Vancouver Island in British Columbia. From the peaks of mountain glaciers to the canopies of Canada’s only rainforest, nature and human spirit coexist in spectacular habitats.

programme.title: E2 - Rebuilding an Empire
programme.desc: Over the course of recorded time, many species have been threatened with extinction. Once-powerful animal empires – like the dinosaurs - have been completely wiped from the planet. But others once on the verge of disappearance have survived, bounced back, and even reclaimed their kingdoms.

programme.title: E2 - The Hummingbird’s Quest
programme.desc: From Colombia’s high plains of the Páramo to its tropical forests, hummingbirds have evolved into an extraordinary number of species. Whether battling freezing rain or jungle predators, each mother must struggle to build a nest, protect her eggs.

programme.title: E6 - Vancouver Island
programme.desc: Journey to the wild Pacific coast on the western shore of Vancouver Island in British Columbia. From the peaks of mountain glaciers to the canopies of Canada’s only rainforest, nature and human spirit coexist in spectacular habitats.

programme.title: E2 - Rebuilding an Empire
programme.desc: Over the course of recorded time, many species have been threatened with extinction. Once-powerful animal empires – like the dinosaurs - have been completely wiped from the planet. But others once on the verge of disappearance have survived, bounced back, and even reclaimed their kingdoms.

programme.title: E2 - Under Pressure
programme.desc: As food and water become scarce, Crystal, the fierce leader of the Ruins gang, sets her sights on rival Kati’s territory and its neighboring fruit trees. Watch as Crystal’s move and a raid by outside invaders lead to dire consequences for one troop.

programme.title: E3 - Into the Darkness
programme.desc: Stay up late as the northern team attaches an activity tag to a bull shark and finds out what this night owl does after sunset. Then dive 80 meters deep with the southern team, who are hoping to put a satellite tracker on a female great white.

programme.title: E2 - The Hummingbird’s Quest
programme.desc: From Colombia’s high plains of the Páramo to its tropical forests, hummingbirds have evolved into an extraordinary number of species. Whether battling freezing rain or jungle predators, each mother must struggle to build a nest, protect her eggs.

programme.title: E2 - The Hummingbird’s Quest
programme.desc: From Colombia’s high plains of the Páramo to its tropical forests, hummingbirds have evolved into an extraordinary number of species. Whether battling freezing rain or jungle predators, each mother must struggle to build a nest, protect her eggs.

programme.title: E4 - The Lower Zambezi
programme.desc: Food, water and shelter are essential to all life on earth from the smallest of beings to the largest, and along the banks of one of Africa’s greatest rivers, some animals struggle while others thrive. A rhythm drives all animals as they journey in search of what they need to survive, and each must decide where and when to move if they’re to succeed... These are the magical worlds of the Lower Zambezi.

programme.title: Oscar ET Malika, Toujours En Retard S3
programme.desc: Oscar and Malika walk to school together. Every morning, they face funny, absurd or ridiculous situations and live improbable adventures.

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil S8
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Le Point:2026
programme.desc: Magazine programme which explores issues relating to society, science and the environment, involving investigations and in-depth analysis, from a resolutely Canadian perspective.

programme.title: E9 - Luigi La Ferla, Mosaic Artist/Camille Viry, Painter
programme.desc: We're off to the Musee des Beaux-Arts in Tours! In the heart of Paris, mosaic artist Luigi La Ferla builds and deconstructs his works. With Mame Kurogouchi, shape is sculpted from the body itself. Painter Camille Viry brings her landscapes to life using traditional decorative painting techniques.

programme.title: Temps Present:2025-2026
programme.desc: ''Temps Present'' tackles current events broadly speaking. With its in-depth investigations and critical vision, the programme sheds light on the crises and the conflicts of our time, while denouncing the malfunctions of our society.

programme.title: E4 - Auvergne: Land Of Excellence
programme.desc: Train of legend, the Venice Simplon-Orient-Express, runs from Venice to Paris. After more than a century of service, the inlaid wood interiors have been preserved thanks to the exceptional skills of the craftsmen of Auvergne. A journey through the land of volcanoes, where tradition and expertise are still handed down.

programme.desc: Mary joins AJ Odudu on a beautiful local allotment to teach her the joy of stress-free cooking. AJ tries her hand at a luscious tiger prawn courgetti and a rich aubergine bhuna.

programme.desc: Monica Galetti and Giles Coren visit ION Adventure Hotel in Iceland, a design hotel levitating out from a dormant volcano. Guests visit here expecting the adventure of a lifetime, exploring lava flows and glaciers.

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: Donal Skehan and his trusty canine companion Max are headed west in search of the scenery, tranquility, and of course, the delicious food that Galway has to offer.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: This time, Jamie shows us a roast dinner cooked all together in one pot, cutting down on washing up but never on flavour; and his store-cupboard version of a speedy carbonara that can use up whatever veg you have to hand. He shares two ways to use pre-packed ingredients to make crowd-pleasing starters or sides, and two stars of Middle Eastern cuisine show how store-cupboard spices can transform everyday ingredients into truly mouth-watering meals.

programme.title: E38
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E38
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: E38
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E38
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88

Mini Match - Serie A 2025/26 E173 -Napoli vs Udinese
E5
programme.desc: 一位正直的明星律師兼忠實粉絲，在偶像被指控謀殺後挺身而出，為他辯護。「孟世娜」是擁有豐富經歷的刑事辯護律師，同時是偶像團體Gold Boys的十年以上的忠實粉絲。在Gold Boys的主唱「都來益」因捲入殺人事件而成為嫌疑人時，她隱藏了自己的崇拜之情，為他辯護，並揭示了一個意想不到的真相。

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: 無論過去、現在、未來，每個別具意義的相遇都造就華麗的日子，且無論什麼人都曾經擁有過華麗的日子。事業、愛情兩得意的能力者李志赫遇上責任感強陽光開朗的咖啡廳經理兼室內設計師池恩悟。兩人儘管外表看似光鮮亮麗，但在經歷人生的低潮後仍守在對方身邊，克服各種試驗，找到人生的真諦。

programme.title: Sab Kushal Mangal
programme.desc: Pappu, a reality show creator, and a corrupt politician lock horns over Pappu's sensational work. Complications ensue further when they fall for the same girl.

programme.desc: Passionate lovers navigate a rollercoaster romance, facing euphoric highs and crushing lows while desperately clinging to their tumultuous bond.

programme.desc: A village-based singer attempts to find love and fame in the big city.

programme.desc: Ruby Wax, Mel B and Emily Atack travel off-road through Utah and trek the mountains of Aspen as they investigate the meaning of the American Dream.

programme.title: E12
programme.desc: Peanut butter cups feature an amazing history and a one-of-a-kind butterscotch coating; starting with giant slabs of butter, three million Sara Lee pound cakes are produced every year; three types of citrus go from tree to jar at this Florida orchard; and a butter chicken cooking sauce is made at a university research facility.
